pi_items.source: Task description and setup_task.sh confirm this exact path.
The exact prefix 'impact_test' is not enforced. OpenToonz defaults to the scene name ('dwanko_run'), and export_result.sh accepts any prefix ending with '0012.png' (via *0012.png wildcard).
verifier.py uses fixed thresholds R > 180, G < 100, B < 100, which corresponds to an asymmetric tolerance up to 75-100, not exactly 50.
Task description requests frames 1 to 24, and verifier.py awards points for total_count >= 24.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying a real OpenToonz sample animation (dwanko_run.tnz) by inserting a solid red frame at index 12, while preserving frames 11 and 13. The output must be rendered to /home/ga/OpenToonz/output/impact_test as a PNG sequence of at least 24 frames. The exact filename prefix is not strictly enforced by the export script, which accepts any file matching *0012.png. The required red color is verified with a lenient threshold (R > 180, G < 100, B < 100) rather than a strict 50-value tolerance from pure red.
